title: State regulators object to Treasury imposing OCC stablecoin rules on states
message_html: State regulators object to Treasury imposing OCC stablecoin rules on states ...
snippet: The Conference of State Bank Supervisors (CSBS) has provided comments to the US Treasury on its proposed rulemaking for state issued stablecoins under the GENIUS Act. title: Tokenized Deposits Set Up Banking's Next Network Race
message_html: Tokenized Deposits Set Up Banking's Next Network Race ...
snippet: As volatility again rattles large swathes of the cryptocurrency market, the largest financial institutions in the United States are moving ahead with plans for a shared tokenized deposit network.
